invalid.ip: Unable to determine a valid IP address.
invalid.url: The provided URL is not valid. Please enter a correct and accessible URL.
invalid.shortUrl: The provided short URL format is invalid.
invalid.password: Password must be between 6 and 20 characters long.
invalid.days: Expiration days must be between 1 and 365.

request.empty: The request body cannot be empty.
request.tooLarge: The request body exceeds the allowed size limit.
request.invalidJson: The request body contains invalid JSON format.

error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
error.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
error.unauthorized: Unauthorized access. Please check your credentials.
error.server: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again later.

success.shorten: Your URL has been successfully shortened.

shorten.protected: This short URL is password-protected. Please provide a valid password.
shorten.notFound: The requested short URL was not found.
shorten.incorrectPassword: The password entered is incorrect. Please try again.

info.rateLimit: You are approaching the request limit. Please slow down.
info.usage: Shortened URLs will expire based on the selected duration.
